rationale: Educ. Code §29.553 governs P-TECH program administration and references the Foundation School Program but contains no provision tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax values. No conflict with the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change.
quote: A student participating in the P-TECH program is entitled to the benefits of the Foundation School Program in proportion to the amount of time spent by the student on high school courses
_note: No direct or indirect statutory linkage between §29.553 and the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
